body_transformation: The rock-like shell transforms into a seamless exoskeleton of gunmetal gray plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns, its jagged edges refined into sharp angular seams. The curled tail tip gains a metallic sheen with chrome silver highlights along the spiral, while the pale cream underbelly becomes a smooth steel blue surface with faint indigo energy lines. Short stubby legs now feature reinforced armor plates at the joints with visible mechanical pistons, and the dark blue spots dissolve into intricate chrome etchings across the body. The rounded head retains its structure but gains a polished metallic finish with deep indigo accents along the ear edges.
signature_feature: Back shell: seamless gunmetal exoskeleton with engraved geometric patterns and glowing indigo energy lines.
